title: cyperus angustatus
intro: Cyperus angustatus, also known as the Narrow-leaved Sedge or Kandung, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cyperus angustatus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antibacterial and antifungal agent. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
